steps.title: Welcome to NoteSentry
steps.desc: A fully on-device MIMIC-III clinical-notes assistant: inference runs on local Ollama, every tool call needs your approval, and nothing is uploaded. This tour gives you a quick overview of the whole system.

steps.title: Activity rail
steps.desc: Switch between Dashboard / Chat / Apps / Tools / Audit / Settings on the left — or jump with ⌘1–6.

steps.title: Governance dashboard
steps.desc: See system governance at a glance: total tool calls, approval rate, per-MCP-pillar activity, and system health — aggregated live from the audit log.

steps.title: Chat exploration
steps.desc: Explore clinical notes in natural language. When the model needs data it issues a tool call and asks for your approval (HITL) before it runs.

steps.title: Clinical apps
steps.desc: Four structured forms, one per MCP server: Triage, SOAP note, Medication safety, and Vitals→FHIR. Load a sample or have the local LLM generate one.

steps.title: MCP tools
steps.desc: Lists the connected MCP servers and their tools. Servers use the standard command/args/env config, and you can add your own.

steps.title: Audit log
steps.desc: Every tool call — arguments, approval, result summary — is written to the audit log, which you can search, filter, and export.

steps.title: Settings
steps.desc: Configure local Ollama, the model, Python and database paths, and manage multiple MCP servers with the connection conformance check.

steps.title: Data stays on this device
steps.desc: All inference runs on local Ollama; nothing is uploaded, shared, or sent for telemetry — in line with the MIMIC-III data use agreement.

steps.title: Tour complete
steps.desc: You've seen NoteSentry's main features. You can reopen this tour anytime from the tour button (top right) or the command palette (⌘K).
